title: Sales Analytics Dashboard
description: Interactive Power BI dashboard for e-commerce sales analysis with real-time KPI tracking, customer segmentation and forecasting.

title: MLOps Analytics Dashboard
description: Streamlit dashboard with DuckDB for sales analytics and machine learning. Complete data science pipeline with real-time visualizations.

title: FastAPI Fraud Detection API
description: REST API service built with FastAPI to analyze transactions and detect fraudulent anomalies in real-time using machine learning.

title: Snowflake Data Lake Pipeline
description: Complete Data Lake architecture with Snowflake, SQL and AWS S3. ANYCOMPANY pipeline with star schema modeling and Bronze/Silver/Gold layers.

title: Streamlit Analytics Dashboard
description: Web analytics application developed with Streamlit and MySQL to visualize real-time product metrics and KPIs.

title: Heart Failure Prediction ML
description: Complete machine learning project: predicting the risk of heart failure. Classification using Random Forest and XGBoost models.

title: Library Management Power BI
description: Power BI dashboard for library data management and analytics. Tracking loans, inventory and member statistics.

title: Airbnb Data Analysis
description: Exploratory data analysis and visualization of Airbnb data. Jupyter notebook with EDA, statistics and market insights.
